|**Epic Link:**|[Friend Container (2026 Q2)](https://icseng.atlassian.net/browse/CCDCON-1173)|
|**Acceptance Criteria:**|- All this stuff is added to the view model for generic page.<br>- Modal can be added as a reference on Page Promos, CTAs, and RTE links.|
|**Severity:**|S2 - Medium|
|**Team:**||

|   |   |
|---|---|
|**Description**||

|   |
|---|
|Design:<br><br>[https://www.figma.com/design/XPrhjjI1kJWtfoHlnB0DQv/Friend-Container-Component-Audit?node-id=5061-35129&t=cGCoY24xktb6gLHP-0](https://www.figma.com/design/XPrhjjI1kJWtfoHlnB0DQv/Friend-Container-Component-Audit?node-id=5061-35129&t=cGCoY24xktb6gLHP-0 "smart-card")<br><br>This is a new component that will allow publishers to add a component that will open a modal when selected. The modal will contain a one column container to restrain the size of the components in the modal.<br><br>This request for this functionality comes from Missionary.<br><br>It can be found on this page:<br><br>[https://www.churchofjesuschrist.org/comeuntochrist/ctr-2/book-of-mormon?lang=eng#find-a-church](https://www.churchofjesuschrist.org/comeuntochrist/ctr-2/book-of-mormon?lang=eng#find-a-church "smart-link")<br><br>It is the Standard List B-looking component that opens modals when the links are selected.<br><br>It basically opens an entire page in a modal.<br><br>Here is another example: [https://www.churchofjesuschrist.org/comeuntochrist](https://www.churchofjesuschrist.org/comeuntochrist "smart-link") The “Grow Closer to God” collection near the bottom of the page.<br><br>### Back End Requirements<br><br>- Create a component called “Modal”. It needs to be a one column container with the contents being added by the publisher.<br><br>- Title (small text, Required)<br>- Description (small text, not required)<br>- Icon (single select dropdown of eden icons, not required)<br>- Contents (Add Module)<br><br>- Limit the components that can be added to<br><br>- Figure<br>- Video<br>- Rich Text<br>- Custom Form<br><br>### Form Requirements<br><br>- On the Page Promo model where it first asks for an Item, add Modal to the dropdown list.<br><br>- On the Call To Action that is on all components, add Modal to the dropdown list. Exclude the Hero CTA.<br><br>- On the RTE Edit Link, add Modal to the dropdown list.<br><br>- Do not allow a component with a reference to a Modal be added to a Modal. We do not want modals being opened from inside a modal.<br><br>### Styles Tab Requirements<br><br>- Add an option called “Modal Width”.<br><br>- Single select dropdown.<br>- Options are Small (504px), Medium (704px), Large (960px)<br>- Default to Medium.<br><br>- Add an option called “Show Header Text and Icon”.<br><br>- Boolean, default to false.<br><br>- Background Color<br><br>- Single select dropdown. <br>- Options are<br><br>- White<br>- Light Gray<br>- Blue (MS Use Only)<br>- Dark Blue (MS Use Only)<br>- Light Yellow (MS Use Only)<br>- Medium Gray (MS Use Only)<br>- Dark Gray (MS Use Only)<br><br>- Default to White. <br><br>- Background Color Top Padding<br><br>- Single select dropdown<br>- Options are 0px, 8px, 16px, 32px, and 64px.<br>- Default value is 32px<br><br>- Background Color Bottom Padding<br><br>- Single select dropdown<br>- Options are 0px, 8px, 16px, 32px, and 64px.<br>- Default value is 32px|
